positive: A whimsical, symmetrical celestial garden motif. Central composition featuring luminous, oversized stylized flora (e.g., glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized ferns) intertwined with deep-space cosmic elements like nebula dust, crescent moons, and geometric constellations. The overall palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, electric cyan, and pops of radiant gold and pale lavender. High contrast, clean silhouette style, graphic linework overlaying soft gradient textures. Designed for apparel print, flat vector aesthetic, perfect symmetry, highly detailed, art deco influence, 8K, minimalist yet complex.
